description: Create a placemark named "Gettysburg Battlefield Visitor Center" at the Gettysburg National Military Park (39.8133°N, 77.2308°W). Include HTML-formatted description with a bold header "Battle of Gettysburg - July 1-3, 1863", at least 3 bullet points on historical significance, and a hyperlink to https://www.nps.gov/gett/. Export to /home/ga/Documents/gettysburg_marker.kml.
